---
pagetitle: "Contact — Simon Yan"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

::: {.section .bg-white style="padding-top:8rem;"}
::: {.section-narrow .text-center .reveal}

[Get in Touch]{.section-label}

## Let's Connect {.section-heading}

I'm open to 2026 opportunities in quantitative finance, AI/ML & forward-deployed engineering, and data analytics — and always happy to talk shop. Reach out through any of the channels below.

:::
:::

<section class="section bg-alt">
<div class="section-wide reveal">
<div class="contact-grid">
<a href="mailto:hyan86652@gmail.com" class="contact-card"><div class="icon"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></div><h3>Email</h3><p>hyan86652@gmail.com</p></a>
<a href="https://linkedin.com/in/sy31" class="contact-card" target="_blank"><div class="icon"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></div><h3>LinkedIn</h3><p>linkedin.com/in/sy31</p></a>
<a href="https://github.com/hy86652" class="contact-card" target="_blank"><div class="icon"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></div><h3>GitHub</h3><p>github.com/hy86652</p></a>
</div>
</div>
</section>

::: {.section .bg-white .text-center}
::: {.section-narrow .reveal}

::: {.info-list}
**Based in:** Ithaca, NY — open to remote & relocation anywhere

**Response time:** I typically respond within 24 hours.

**Preferred contact:** Email for professional inquiries · LinkedIn for networking.
:::

::: {.hero-cta style="justify-content:center;margin-top:2rem;"}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> View Resume](resume.qmd){.btn-primary-custom}
[<i class="bi bi-grid-1x2"></i> See My Work](projects.qmd){.btn-outline-custom}
:::

:::
:::
